title: mentha tolrai
intro: Mentha tolrai, also known as Indian peppermint or Tolai, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Western Ghats of India. Its leaves have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha tolrai include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and fever, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
